blended.narrative: Lost Trail is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 17 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,332 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 55".
